listOfQuestions.question: Which Music Theory concept is described by this clue: The regular pulse in music?
Which Music Theory concept is described by this clue: The speed of the beat?
Which Music Theory concept is described by this clue: The grouping of beats into repeating patterns?
Which Music Theory concept is described by this clue: A segment of music containing a set number of beats?
Which Music Theory concept is described by this clue: A sequence of pitches heard as a musical line?
Which Music Theory concept is described by this clue: The combination of notes sounded together?
Which Music Theory concept is described by this clue: Three or more notes sounded together?
Which Music Theory concept is described by this clue: An ordered set of pitches?
Which Music Theory concept is described by this clue: The tonal center of a piece of music?
Which Music Theory concept is described by this clue: The distance between two pitches?
Which Music Theory concept is described by this clue: How loud or soft music is played?
Which Music Theory concept is described by this clue: The tone color or quality of a sound?
Which Music Theory concept is described by this clue: How notes are started, connected, or separated?
Which Music Theory concept is described by this clue: Smoothly connected notes?
Which Music Theory concept is described by this clue: Short separated notes?
Which Music Theory concept is described by this clue: A musical ending or point of rest?
Which Music Theory concept is described by this clue: A short recurring musical idea?
Which Music Theory concept is described by this clue: Creating music spontaneously while performing?
Which Music Theory concept is described by this clue: How high or low a sound is perceived?
Which Music Theory concept is described by this clue: The pattern of sounds and silences in time?
